package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for middleware_allocates_regex_or_template_per_request: Regexp compilation inside Gin handlers instead of using precompiled patterns.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule326NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule326NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule326NegativeRecord) (Rule326NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario326Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule326NegativeService, input Rule326NegativeRecord) (Rule326NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule326NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
